_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Egg PM2 by zakkixd (Multi-OS)
author: zakkixd@developer.id
description:
Egg PM2 by zakkixd (Multi-OS: Ubuntu & Debian)
Solusi profesional untuk menjalankan aplikasi Node.js dengan PM2 di Pterodactyl Panel menggunakan OS Ubuntu/Debian.
Dukung multi-version Node.js v16 s/d v24 (NVM), PM2 Latest, NPM Latest, Auto-update Git, Cloudflared Tunnel, dan Speedtest CLI.
startup: export NVM_DIR="/home/container/.nvm"; [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"; nvm use {{NODE_VERSION}}; if [[ -d .git ]] && [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]]; then git pull; fi; if [[ ! -z ${NODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [[ ! -z ${UNNODE_PACKAGES} ]]; then /usr/local/bin/npm uninstall ${UNNODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ -f /home/container/package.json ]; then npm install; fi; pm2 start {{JS_FILE}} --name zakkixd-app --no-daemon

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ================================================================
# Installation Script ‚ÄĒ Egg PM2 by zakkixd
# Developer: zakkixd
# ================================================================

RED='\033[1;31m'
GREEN='\033[1;32m'
CYAN='\033[1;36m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
MAGENTA='\033[1;35m'
WHITE='\033[1;37m'
NC='\033[0m'

clear
echo -e "${CYAN}"
echo "  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó "
echo "  ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēź‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēź‚ēź‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ‚ēö‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēź‚ēź‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó"
echo "    ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ ‚ēö‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ"
echo "   ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēź‚ēź‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēź‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēź‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ"
echo "  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ  ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĎ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ ‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēó‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚Ėą‚ēĒ‚ēĚ"
echo "  ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēĚ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēĚ  ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēĚ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēĚ  ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēĚ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēĚ  ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēĚ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēĚ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēĚ  ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēĚ‚ēö‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēź‚ēĚ "
echo -e "${NC}"
echo -e "${MAGENTA}[ Installation Script ‚ÄĒ Egg PM2 by zakkixd ]${NC}"
echo ""

apt update
apt install -y git curl wget tar procps lsb-release

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# Clone atau download project
if [ ! -z "${GITHUB_URL}" ]; then
    echo -e "${CYAN}[zakkixd] Cloning repository: ${GITHUB_URL}${NC}"
    git clone ${GITHUB_URL} .
fi

# Load NVM for installations
export NVM_DIR="/home/container/.nvm"
if [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ]; then
    . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
    nvm use ${NODE_VERSION}
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo -e "${CYAN}[zakkixd] Installing npm dependencies...${NC}"
    npm install
fi

echo -e "${GREEN}[zakkixd] ‚úď Installation complete!${NC}"

variables.name: Node.js Version
variables.description: Versi Node.js yang ingin dijalankan (Gunakan angka saja). Contoh: 16, 18, 20, 22, 24 atau 'latest'.

variables.name: JS File
variables.description: File JavaScript utama yang akan dijalankan PM2. Contoh: index.js, bot.js, app.js

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Set ke 1 agar server otomatis melakukan git pull setiap kali restart.

variables.name: GitHub Repository URL
variables.description: URL repository GitHub yang akan di-clone saat instalasi. Kosongkan jika upload manual.

variables.name: NPM Extra Packages
variables.description: Paket npm tambahan yang ingin diinstall. Pisahkan dengan spasi. Contoh: axios dotenv

variables.name: NPM Uninstall Packages
variables.description: Paket npm yang ingin diuninstall. Pisahkan dengan spasi.
